acceptance: StorageAdapter trait compiles; SQLite backend passes: create entity, read entity, update with version check, delete, range scan; version conflict correctly detected and rejected
description: Define the StorageAdapter trait (get, put, delete, range_scan, begin_tx, commit_tx, abort_tx, compare_and_swap). Implement SQLite backend using libsql crate. Entity and link storage with version tracking.
title: Implement storage adapter trait and SQLite backend

acceptance: gRPC client can create collection, CRUD entities, create links, query audit log; HTTP gateway serves same operations; errors are structured with field-level details
description: gRPC server (tonic) exposing collection, entity, link, audit, and transaction operations. HTTP/JSON gateway. Protobuf definitions as source of truth. Structured error responses.
title: Implement gRPC API server

acceptance: cargo check passes; cargo clippy passes; cargo test runs (even if no tests yet); workspace compiles on stable Rust
description: Create Cargo workspace with crate structure: axon-core, axon-schema, axon-audit, axon-storage, axon-api, axon-cli. Set up CI with cargo check, clippy, test. Add CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md.
title: Set up Rust project skeleton

acceptance: Every entity create/update/delete produces audit entry; audit entries are immutable (no update/delete API); query by entity ID returns all mutations in order; query by time range works
description: Append-only audit log capturing every mutation. Each entry: id, timestamp, actor, operation, collection, entity_id, before, after, diff, metadata. Queryable by collection, entity, actor, time range. Stored via StorageAdapter.
title: Implement audit log

acceptance: axon collection create works in embedded mode; axon entity create/get round-trips; axon audit list shows mutations; --output json produces valid JSON
description: axon CLI wrapping gRPC API. Supports embedded mode (no server) and remote mode. Commands: collection create/list/describe/drop, entity create/get/update/delete/list/query, link create/list/traverse, audit list/show/revert, schema show/validate. Output formats: table, JSON, YAML.
title: Implement CLI

acceptance: Cycle test (ring of entities with link traversals) passes under normal execution; cycle test detects injected isolation violations; same seed produces identical execution; BUGGIFY injects at least: write delays, transaction aborts, storage errors
description: Build DST framework inspired by FoundationDB. Runtime abstraction trait (Net2/Sim2 pattern). Deterministic random with seed replay. BUGGIFY macro for fault injection. Cycle test for transactional isolation. Run in MadSim or custom single-threaded simulator.
title: Set up deterministic simulation testing framework

acceptance: Full CRUD lifecycle for entities; link creation between entities; traversal follows links to depth 3; schema validation rejects invalid writes; OCC rejects stale version updates
description: Entity operations: create, read, update (full + partial), delete, list, query with filters. Link operations: create, delete, query from/to entity, traverse with depth. All operations validate against schema, produce audit entries, and support OCC via version.
title: Implement entity and link CRUD operations

acceptance: Debit account A + credit account B atomically succeeds; partial failure rolls back all changes; version conflict in any entity aborts entire transaction; audit entries share transaction ID
description: Multi-entity/link atomic transactions with serializable isolation via OCC. Transaction begin/commit/abort. Version checks per entity within transaction. Atomic audit entry creation. Transaction ID shared across audit entries.
title: Implement ACID transaction manager

acceptance: Parse sample ESF from ADR-002; validate valid entity returns Ok; validate invalid entity returns structured errors with field path; sub-millisecond validation for typical entities
description: Parse ESF YAML/JSON definitions (Layer 1: JSON Schema 2020-12 for entity body, Layer 2: Axon link-type definitions, Layer 3: validation rules). Validate entity documents against schemas using jsonschema crate. Return structured errors with field path, expected, actual, message.
title: Implement ESF schema parser and validator
